hooks.name: Hypothesis Property Auto-Runner
hooks.description: After each task execution completes, automatically runs the Hypothesis property-based test suite to catch edge-case failures immediately rather than letting them accumulate. Runs pytest with hypothesis statistics so failures are surfaced right after the implementation step that introduced them.

action.command: conda run -n roadblock pytest tests/ --hypothesis-show-statistics -x -q 2>&1 | tail -50
